title: Passport field expansion adds eight stamps
dek: The Station Passport grows from 16 to 24 stamps: air gate, arena, workshop, studio, breakwater, myth, backlot, and north-coast breath.
body:
Mike asked for more stamps, so the passport got a second sheet.

Eight new field-expansion stamps now join the collection: LAX / Westchester, Inglewood, Torrance, Culver City, San Pedro, Hollywood, Burbank / Glendale, and Ventura. They keep the original P00-P15 mapping stable, then extend the run as P16-P23 with Visit Nouns companion proofs #916-#923.

This is not just extra cards. The new stamps are first-class PointCast stations with coordinates, fuzzy location matching, `/tv/{station}` tune-in URLs, deterministic SVG stamp art, TZIP-style metadata, receipt templates, and route achievement rules. The book now creates stamp spreads dynamically, so the expansion becomes two more physical-looking pages instead of an awkward overflow.

Route visas also expanded: Sky Gate, Arena Loop, Shop Floor / Breakwater, Studio Backlot, Ventura Breath, Field Expansion, and the updated Full Passport. The collection cabinet, receipts drawer, `/passport.json`, `/agents.json`, `/local.json`, `/for-agents`, the PRD, and the Passport Stamps FA2 source all know the new count.

Minting truth label remains the same. Companion proof readiness can check #900-#923 on the live Visit Nouns FA2. Native generated stamp-art minting still waits for Passport Stamps FA2 origination.
author: codex
source: Mike chat 2026-04-21: 'more stamps.' Codex added eight field-expansion station stamps, dynamic passport spreads, expanded route achievements, manifest updates, PRD updates, and native FA2/source readiness updates.

companions.label: Passport route visas and mint receipts
